sys_ui_page.html:
var styleSheets = []; styleSheets.push("tasker-modal-prompt-UIPages.css"); var linkTags = []; for (var sheet in styleSheets) { var css = new GlideRecord("content_css"); css.addQuery("name", styleSheets[sheet]); css.query(); css.next(); linkTags.push(css.sys_id+".cssdbx?ver="+css.sys_updated_on); } Tasker - Please choose to reopen only the top task or all of its subtasks as well Tasker - Button - Confirm Tasker - This Task Only Tasker - This Task and all Subtasks Tasker - This Task and {0} Subtasks closed with this task on {1} var closedAt = ''; var taskSys_id = jelly.jvar_taskSysId; var grTask = new GlideRecord('x_153465_discovert_route_task_instance'); grTask.addQuery('sys_id', taskSys_id); grTask.query(); if (grTask.next()) { closedAt = grTask.getDisplayValue('closed_at'); } closedAt; var messageOpenTasksCount = ''; var descendantsCount = 0; var details = { countType: 'ALL', taskClosedDate: jelly.jvar_closedAt, taskSysId: jelly.jvar_taskSysId }; var taskerHelpers = new TaskerHelpers(); descendantsCount = taskerHelpers.getDescendantsCount(details); messDescendantsCount = gs.getMessage('Tasker - This Task and {0} Subtasks closed with this task on {1}', [descendantsCount, jelly.jvar_closedAt]);
${gs.getMessage('Tasker - Please choose to reopen only the top task or all of its subtasks as well')}




${gs.getMessage('cancel')} ${gs.getMessage('Tasker - Button - Confirm')}
sys_ui_page.name: reopen_task_prompt
